name: Hwa Hong Corporation Limited
summary: Hwa Hong Corporation Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the investment, development, and rental of properties in Singapore and the United Kingdom. It operates in three segments: Rental, Investments, and Corporate and Others. The company is involved in the leasing of residential and commercial properties; provision of real estate investment advisory services; and ownership of warehouse for rental and storage, as well as packing and trading of edible oils. It also provides business management and consultancy services. The company was formerly known as Hwa Hong Manufacturing Company Limited and changed its name to Hwa Hong Corporation Limited in January 1985. Hwa Hong Corporation Limited was incorporated in 1952 and is based in Singapore.
